TestCase z14Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_sortedElements = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_sortedElements, t1.sortedElements, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.sortedElements = follow_case_sortedElements;
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n > 0) {
        // Operation: take absolute value of each element
        for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
            if (follow_case.sortedElements[i] < 0) {
                follow_case.sortedElements[i] = -follow_case.sortedElements[i];
            }
        }
    }

    return follow_case;
}
